properties.entry: SELECT user_id, role FROM users WHERE user_id = ? AND password = ?
UPDATE room_manage SET room_name = ?, capacity = ?, room_location = ?, room_description = ?, updated_at = NOW() WHERE room_id = ?
INSERT INTO room_manage(room_id,room_name, capacity, room_location, room_description, usage_time,amenity,minibar,created_at) VALUES (?,?, ?, ?, ?,?,?,?, NOW())
INSERT INTO room_image (room_id, image_path, is_main, display_order, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, NOW())
SELECT image_path FROM room_image WHERE room_id = ?
